responsibilities: Lead end-to-end product design from concept ideation through detailed engineering and manufacturing handoff
Develop 3D CAD models and engineering drawings that balance aesthetic intent with manufacturability and cost targets
Build rapid prototypes using 3D printing and CNC machining to validate form, fit, and user experience
Collaborate with industrial designers, marketing, and manufacturing partners to translate concepts into producible products
Conduct design for manufacturing and assembly reviews to reduce production cost and improve assembly efficiency
Manage supplier relationships and factory visits to oversee tooling development and first-article inspections
Define and execute product testing plans to validate durability, usability, and regulatory compliance requirements
Drive design iterations based on user feedback, market research, and competitive product teardown analysis
Document design specifications and maintain version control across the product development lifecycle
